parts.text: i have an important date to add, May 16th, it was the day we had our wedding in

💕 Thank you for sharing your special wedding date! I've added May 16th to our important dates tracker. 

📅 I notice you didn't specify the year - is this your original wedding year? For anniversary purposes, we'll celebrate this date each year as your special day. When May 16th arrives, I'll send you a reminder so you can plan something meaningful to celebrate your love!

🌹 As your wedding anniversary approaches, I'd be happy to suggest some celebration ideas:
- Recreate elements from your wedding day (first dance song, favorite meal)
- Plan a romantic weekend getaway
- Write each other love letters reflecting on your journey together
- Renew your vows in a special ceremony
- Create a memory scrapbook of your married life

Would you like me to add any specific details about this date, or do you have any particular anniversary traditions you'd like to establish? 💕
